text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I head to the shopping district on my<n>day off. While
there, I hear some kind<n>of commotion unfolding.

text_block_list.name: Bento Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I made such a huge<n>error... There's
no way I'll be able to<n>use up all this rice! What
should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, that sounds tough. But don't<n>beat
yourself up. Everyone makes<n>mistakes, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
We just need to think outside the<n>box! And I know
just the thing!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: First, we put up a poster... Okay, there<n>we go!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Greetings! Get your boxed lunches<n>here! Only 500
yen! And for just 100<n>yen more, you'll get double
the rice!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
And there's nothing wrong with it, by<n>the way!
You can eat it with total<n>peace of mind! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, isn't that Pearl over there? She's<n>selling...
bentos?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Wow, we get that much for that price?<n>What a
deal! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! We were just thinking of<n>having lunch!
Super size me, por<n>favor!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! ♪ One super size bento,<n>coming right
up!

text_block_list.name: Bento Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Wow. I can't believe how much rice<n>the
Umamusume students are buying!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, broadening your horizons<n>opens up all
kinds of possibilities.<n>Never give up!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I leave the shopping district, touched<n>by what I've
seen. However...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later on, as I arrive at the shopping<n>mall, I notice
an incredibly detailed<n>mannequin. It almost looks
alive...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It... even breathes? I do a double take,<n>and then I
realize...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Pearl?! What are you doing<n>here?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Th-that was... quite the shock.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ho, ho, ho. ♪ We meet again.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Actually, my friend working in retail<n>accidentally
broke a mannequin, so<n>now I'm working part-time
as a<n>temporary mannequin.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You can do that?! I've never heard of<n>a job like
that!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
The world works in mysterious ways.<n>Ah, but
since I'm a mannequin, I<n>should really stay quiet.
♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sh-she really is quiet.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, we don't want to get in your<n>way, so
we'll be leaving now. See<n>you, Pearl.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Pearl, you were so amazing today! Do<n>you always
spend your days off like<n>that?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I do. You see, I don't want<n>anyone to
squander their potential.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's why I lead through action. "As<n>long as you
don't give up, a path will<n>reveal itself." That's my
motto!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I just can't help buying into<n>everything
Pearl says.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've received thank-you<n>messages from the
two people I<n>helped today. How sweet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl believes in the<n>power of never
giving up. And it looks<n>like she holds herself to
that principle<n>too.
